acceptanceCriteria.AC1: PASS - PUT /api/forms/:formId/fields persisted edits and incremented version from 1 -> 2 -> 3 across two saves
acceptanceCriteria.AC2: PASS - Form record versionHistory appended entries per save with version, savedAt timestamp, fieldCount, isPublished
acceptanceCriteria.AC3: PASS - POST /api/forms/:formId/publish set form status to published, set publishedSchemaId, and marked current version as published in history
acceptanceCriteria.AC4: PASS - Publish response included { formId, version, status: 'published', publishedAt }
acceptanceCriteria.AC5: PASS - GET /api/forms/:formId/schema returned published schema JSON after publish
acceptanceCriteria.AC7: PASS - Published schema response contained metadata formId, version, publishedAt, and title
acceptanceCriteria.AC8: PASS - Editor page includes Publish form button with GOV.UK classes 'govuk-button govuk-button--secondary' (id='publish-button')
acceptanceCriteria.AC9: PASS - Publishing via UI shows GOV.UK success notification banner with role='alert' and publish confirmation message
acceptanceCriteria.AC10: PASS - Dashboard shows Published status badge for published forms using GOV.UK tag class 'govuk-tag govuk-tag--blue'
acceptanceCriteria.AC11: PASS - Backend tests cover save/publish/serve/404 scenarios; full suite passed 90/90 with publish.test and api.test included

bugs.title: Frontend build is not clean (asset resolution warnings)
bugs.actual: Vite build emits unresolved asset warnings for GOV.UK fonts and crest SVG (will remain unresolved at runtime).

bugs.title: Runtime font decode errors in browser
bugs.steps: Open `http://127.0.0.1:5173/` in browser and inspect console.
bugs.actual: Console shows multiple 'Failed to decode downloaded font' and 'OTS parsing error: invalid sfntVersion' warnings.
